description_long: This house features a green gabled roof with multiple intersecting sections and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, complemented by a stone or brick foundation. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house includes a driveway with two parked cars and a walkway leading to the main entrance, which is sheltered by the porch. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms and furnishings, while the surrounding yard is landscaped with grass and sparse shrubbery. The overall design blends traditional residential elements with a spacious, inviting layout.
description: A spacious house with a green gabled roof, light siding, a large front porch, and an open upper floor revealing interior rooms. The property includes a driveway, two cars, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large porch with white columns, driveway with two cars, and open upper floor layout.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back and side walls, multiple roof sections, and visible interior rooms on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the green gabled roof, light siding, and the driveway extending to the side of the house.
description_view_3: Rear perspective with a clear view of the back porch, steps, and the open upper floor, as well as the driveway and cars from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with white columns, steps leading up, and a prominent front door.
